user_prompt:
![%D0%B8%D0%B7%D0%BE%D0%B1%D1%80%D0%B0%D0%B6%D0%B5%D0%BD%D0%B8%D0%B5.webp](01-user-prompt-image-01.png)

1. Separate Commission dashboard page (with all data shown / expanded by default)
2. Extract projects to separate dashboard page

reference_page.layout_type: full-page dashboard with multiple collapsible cards
patterns_noted: CommissionVisibilityContext wraps commission card to hide/show dollar amounts
DrilldownTable cards use collapsible prop on Card component
showDetails toggler (Show commission structure) defaults to true in CommissionDashboard component
showAll toggler (Show all) defaults to false — request says expanded by default means this should be true on dedicated page

similar_patterns.description: Personal business line dashboard — separate page for a sub-view of a combined dashboard
CommissionDashboard (full summary) — separate page for user's own commissions

image_observations: Page has a top-level 'Commission' card with an interval date-range picker in the toolbar (top-right)
Commission card toolbar also has a visibility toggle ('hide' eye icon) and export button
Inside Commission card: three circular stats widgets in a row — Summary (yellow), Structure (green), Sharing (blue)
Below the stats: 'Commission drilldown' secondary card — collapsible, with 'Show commission structure' and 'Show all' togglers in its toolbar
Below that: 'Forecast commission drilldown' secondary card — collapsible, same togglers
Commission drilldown table columns: #, Client, SC, SNC, Team, $ NET Rev, % NET Budget, then Dir / Referral / Sharing / Commission column groups
Below Commission card: 'RM projects' section with Revenue / Net Revenue / Origination stat widgets and a detailed project table
RM projects table columns: Name, Client, SNC, SNC, Status, Type, RM, NET J.Cli, then REV section (Paid$, Target$, Invoiced$, Target$) and COS and NET sections
Below RM projects: 'LM projects' section with the same layout

The request says 'all data shown / expanded by default' — this means the collapsible DrilldownTable cards should be open (not collapsed) and 'Show all' should be true by default on the Commission-only page

commission_page.description: New page showing only the Commission section (stats + drilldowns) with all data expanded by default
commission_page.key_change: Pass showAll=true and do not collapse DrilldownTable cards by default

projects_page.description: Refactored RmDashboard (or new page) showing only RM Projects + LM Projects
